name: Musashi [Complete]
description:
"How precious... If the warmth of one's touch is what you crave, then leap into my bosom. There is nothing to be ashamed of." - Musashi

One of the Yamato-class battleships, clad in a cool-headed and solemn aura and wielding the might of thunder. In reality, she is a very gentle person who takes good care of her family, especially those she deems "weak". This includes (of course) her commander...

Art Source
